12.reason: Missing space between numbers; expected output requires each integer separated by a space

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing space between numbers; expected output requires each integer separated by a space
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing space between numbers; expected output requires each integer separated by a space.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  missing space after %d, should be "%d " to separate numbers
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing space between numbers; should be "%d " to match expected output.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing space separator between integers. The problem requires each integer in a line to be separated by a space.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing space separator between numbers as required by the output format.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing space after each number; output format requires space-separated integers]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing space after each number; output format requires space-separated integers]

3.reason: Array size insufficient for indices 1..N when N=10 (out of bounds at f[10]).

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Array size insufficient for indices 1..N when N=10 (out of bounds at f[10]).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array size is insufficient. N can be up to 10, and f is indexed from 1 to N, so accessing f[10] causes an out-of-bounds error. Size should be at least 11.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Array size should be at least 11 to safely handle N=10, as index 10 is accessed causing out-of-bounds.
